zh.lifeSummary: 當William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet於1176年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 馬利特時，他的父親Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet27歲，母親Alice Picot21歲。他於大約1195年與Alice Basset of Headington結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1217年在他的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet was born in 1176, in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet, was 27 and his mother, Alice Picot, was 21. He married Alice Basset of Headington about 1195. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1217, in his hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet est né en 1176, à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Alice Picot, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Alice Basset of Headington environ 1195. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1217, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Curry Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet 1176 in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet 27 und seine Mutter Alice Picot 21. Er hat um 1195 Alice Basset of Headington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1217 im Alter von 41 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Curry Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet è nato il nel 1176 nel Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Alice Picot, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Alice Basset of Headington circa 1195. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1217, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Malet Lord of Curry Malletが1176年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットで生まれた時，父Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Maletは27歳，母Alice Picotは21歳であった。約1195年にAlice Basset of Headingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1217年に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー マレットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet(이)가 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 맬렛에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Picot(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1195년 Alice Basset of Headington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1217년 그의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 맬렛에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet nasceu em 1176, em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Alice Picot, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Basset of Headington aproximadamente 1195. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1217, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Curry Mallet, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Malet Lord of Curry Mallet родился в 1176 г. в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gilbert Malet Lord of Curry Malet было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Picot, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Basset of Headington около 1195 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1217 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности курри маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
